% Read result file generated by cfstool
/POST1  
INRES,ALL   
FILE,'surfmesh_grid','rst','results_rst'
SET,FIRST   
eplo

% Switch to preprocessor
/prep7
init

% Set element type of surface elems for mkhdf5 to quadrilateral
et,6,200,6
esel,all
emodif,all,type,6

% Create transitional pyramids
MOPT,PYRA,1
MSHAPE,1,3D

% Mesh using bricks, tets and pyras
setelems,'brick'
fvmesh
esel,all
welems,'volume'

eps = 1e-6

% Select nodes at y=0 and create surface elements
setelems,'quadr'
nsel,s,loc,y,0-eps,0+eps
esurf
esln,s,1
welems,'bottom'

% Select nodes at y=0.1 and create surface elements
esel,all
nsel,s,loc,y,0.1-eps,0.1+eps
esurf
esln,s,1
welems,'top'

% Write out nodes
nsel,all
wnodes

% Create HDF5 file
mkhdf5,,'tolerant'
